3098770.name: Shadows of Delusion
3098770.description:
Shadows of Delusion is a classic inspired, first-person survival horror game where you must survive the horrors of a desolate town filled with disturbing delusions.

Fight against horrific creatures:

Using any weapons you come across and conserving your ammo is necessary to survive this nightmare.

Journey through the surreal hellscape of the human mind:

Explore horrifying locations to find items and documents to search for answers.

Solve challenging puzzles:

Discover the secrets of the delusion by solving twisted puzzles.
3098770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
